contract.name: v2/agency/toptier_code/awards/new/count.md
contract.description: Returns the number of new awards for a specified toptier agency, optionally filtered by fiscal year, agency role, and validated award type code lists (including sentinel categories exposed by the API).

toptier_code.description: Numeric identifier for the toptier agency (CGAC or FREC).
toptier_code.constraints: Required. 3-4 digit numeric string; leading zeros allowed. Non-numeric or wrong-length values return 404 HTML responses.

fiscal_year.description: Appropriations fiscal year to evaluate when counting new awards.
fiscal_year.constraints: Optional. Accepts 4-digit years from 2008 through 2026. Non-numeric input returns 400; out-of-range years return 422. Defaults to the current fiscal year when omitted.

agency_type.description: Selects whether the agency is considered in an awarding or funding role.
agency_type.constraints: Optional enum. Allowed values: 'awarding' (default) or 'funding'. Case-sensitive; other values, including uppercase variants, return 400.

award_type_codes.description: Comma-separated list of uppercase award type codes to include. Sentinels '-1' and 'no intersection' are also accepted.
award_type_codes.constraints: Optional. Tokens must come from ['-1','02','03','04','05','06','07','08','09','10','11','A','B','C','D','IDV_A','IDV_B','IDV_B_A','IDV_B_B','IDV_B_C','IDV_C','IDV_D','IDV_E','no intersection'] and be comma-separated with no embedded spaces. Mixed valid/invalid tokens or lowercase entries return 400.

toptier_code.description: Echo of the requested toptier agency code.

fiscal_year.description: Fiscal year covered by the returned count. Defaults to the current fiscal year when not specified.

agency_type.description: Indicates whether the count reflects an awarding or funding role.

award_type_codes.description: Null when no award_type_codes filter is provided; otherwise echoes the validated tokens in request order.

new_award_count.description: Total number of new awards that satisfy the supplied filters (integer count).

quirks: Requests without the trailing slash receive a 301 redirect to the slash-suffixed path.
When award_type_codes is omitted the response still includes the field but its value is null.
award_type_codes parsing is strict: tokens must be uppercase without spaces, and sentinel codes '-1' and 'no intersection' can be combined with standard codes.
Invalid fiscal_year values outside 2008-2026 return 422 errors rather than 400.
404 responses for unknown agency codes return HTML instead of JSON.
risks: Clients expecting JSON errors may break because 404 responses come back as HTML pages.
Trailing-slash dependent routing could cause double requests if callers do not follow redirects.
Default fiscal year advances annually, so cached expectations of the baseline year may drift.
Strict award_type_codes formatting (uppercase, no spaces) makes user-entered lists prone to 400 validation errors.
gaps: Meaning of the sentinel award_type_codes values '-1' and 'no intersection' remains undocumented despite being accepted.

probes.notes: Missing trailing slash triggers redirect to the slash-suffixed path.
Baseline defaults to fiscal_year 2026, agency_type awarding, and null award_type_codes.
fiscal_year overrides the default when set within the accepted range.
Mixed sentinel and standard award_type_codes succeed and increase the count.
Parameter is case-sensitive; uppercase value rejected.
Years below 2008 produce a 422 validation error.
Embedded spaces in award_type_codes trigger 400 validation errors.

mismatches: Docs claim award_type_codes always returns an array, but live responses return null when no filter is supplied.
Documentation example uses 'award_count' while the API returns 'new_award_count'.
Docs omit sentinel award_type_codes '-1' and 'no intersection', yet the API validates against them.
gaps: Meaning of the sentinel award_type_codes values '-1' and 'no intersection' remains undocumented despite being accepted.
risks: Clients expecting JSON errors may break because 404 responses come back as HTML pages.
Trailing-slash dependent routing could cause double requests if callers do not follow redirects.
Default fiscal year advances annually, so cached expectations of the baseline year may drift.
Strict award_type_codes formatting (uppercase, no spaces) makes user-entered lists prone to 400 validation errors.
